name: Normal Operation
description: Baseline synthetic traffic with healthy feeds.

name: Hidden Shared-Cash Shortage
description: Heavy bKash cash-out demand depletes shared physical cash while bKash e-money rises.

name: Liquidity Pressure with Unusual Activity
description: Near-identical repeated amounts alongside falling shared cash.

name: Data Inconsistency
description: Delayed/conflicting snapshots lower confidence and suppress alerts.

name: Coordinated Response and Closure
description: An alert is routed and resolved through a case lifecycle.
